message:
feat(rchd): Add benchmark scheduler for intelligent benchmark orchestration

Implement BenchmarkScheduler that manages when and how benchmarks run on
workers, balancing measurement freshness against system load impact.

Features:
- Priority queue (High > Normal > Low) for benchmark requests
- Worker eligibility checks (idle detection via telemetry CPU threshold)
- Drift detection triggers early re-benchmark
- Manual trigger support via API
- Concurrent benchmark limits
- Failure handling with retry logic
- Worker slot reservation during benchmark

9 unit tests covering priority ordering, concurrent limits, manual triggers,
completion/failure handling, and slot management.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
